opinion.h1: SNYDER v. TOWN OF NEWTOWN, 365 U.S. 299 (1961)
opinion.h4: SNYDER ET AL. v. TOWN OF NEWTOWN ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ERRORS OF CONNECTICUT. No. 580. Decided February 20, 1961.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
James J. O'Connell and Albert L. Coles for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER and MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS are of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
opinion.h4: CORDAK v. REUBEN H. DONNELLEY CORP., 365 U.S. 299 (1961)
opinion.p: 365 U.S. 299 CORDAK, DOING BUSINESS AS A. B. DENTAL PLATE LABORATORY, ET AL. v. REUBEN H. DONNELLEY CORP. ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 582. Decided February 20, 1961.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
